description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OCaml Binding CI that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to run a build-test job on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest environments with OCaml version 5. For each job, check out the code, cache ccache and opam, set up OCaml, install platform-specific dependencies, install required opam packages, configure with CMake, build Z3 and OCaml bindings, and run several OCaml example compilations and executions.
